title: Firefuels
summary: Per-km² costs and benefits of wildfire fuel treatment in California.
description: A statewide MapLibre + PMTiles visualization of where prescribed-burn and mechanical-thinning fuel treatments would deliver the most net benefit per square kilometer, integrating wildfire risk, suppression cost, and ecological value.

title: Material flows explorer
summary: Historical (1970–2024) global use of 22 material categories across 8 world regions, with flexible chart types and shareable views.
description: An interactive explorer of UNEP-IRP material flow data — domestic extraction, consumption, and trade — across 8 world regions (country-level coming soon). Switch chart types, normalize by population or GDP, and overlay iso-curves on phase plots. Companion to Busch et al., on the limits of material efficiency and circular economy.
